description: Refactor Pin Location system UI/UX: remove color picker, update icon list to 10 emojis, simplify pin rendering to icon-only with dark outline, fix z-index layering of edit popover, and simplify sidebar pin entries.
steps: Step 1 - Update PinPanel.jsx: Remove PIN_COLORS export, update PIN_ICONS to the new 10-icon set, remove color picker from editing mode, remove colored dot from display mode (show only icon), update commitEdit to not pass color.

Step 2 - Update App.jsx pin rendering: Remove colored circle marker and triangle pointer, render pin as icon-only with dark outline/drop-shadow. Fix z-index of edit popover to z-[9999]. Remove color picker from edit popover. Update PIN_ICONS reference to use new icon set. Update addPin defaults to remove color reliance (keep field for backward compat). Change import to not import PIN_COLORS.
Step 3 - Verify build passes with npx vite build.
acceptance_criteria: Running `npx vite build` succeeds without errors
Pin edit popover uses z-[9999] to render above all cards
No color picker UI in either PinPanel or canvas edit popover
Pin icons list contains all 10 specified emojis
Canvas pins render as icon-only with dark outline/shadow for visibility
Sidebar pin entries show only the icon (no colored dot)
Color field remains in data model for backward compatibility
verification: Run `cd /projects/sandbox/mind-map && npx vite build` and confirm it completes with exit code 0
findings: Refactoring complete. Removed all color picker UI from PinPanel and App.jsx canvas popover. Updated PIN_ICONS to the 10-emoji set. Canvas pins now render as icon-only with drop-shadow for dark outline visibility. Edit popover z-index set to z-[9999]. Sidebar entries show only icon. Color field remains in data model for backward compat. Build passes cleanly.
